<!-- Generated by pnpm run docgen. Do not edit directly. -->

Represents the data structure for an item.

```ts
type ShopItemData = ItemData & { bEnhShop?: boolean; bHouse: string; FactionID: string; iClass: string; iQSindex: string; iQSvalue: string; iQtyRemain: string; iReqCP: string; iReqRep: string; ItemProcID?: string; sFaction: string; ShopItemID: string; sQuest?: string; turnin?: { iQty: string; ItemID: string; sName: string }[] }
```
